AbstractEdge - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
This class provides a basic implementation of Edge interface, to minimize the effort required to implement this interface.
AbstractElement - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
A base implementation of an element.
AbstractElement(String) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AbstractElement
New element.
AbstractElement.AttributeChangeEvent - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的枚举
 
AbstractGraph - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
This class provides a basic implementation of Graph interface, to minimize the effort required to implement this interface.
AbstractGraph(String) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AbstractGraph
The same as AbstractGraph(id, true, false)
AbstractGraph(String, boolean, boolean) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AbstractGraph
Creates a new graph.
AbstractNode - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
This class provides a basic implementation of Node interface, to minimize the effort required to implement this interface.
accumulateEnergy(double) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.Energies
Accumulate some energy in the current energy cell.
activate() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.StyleGroup.ElementEvents
 
activateEventsFor(Element) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.StyleGroup
Before drawing an element that has events, use this method to activate the events, the style values will be modified accordingly.

addEdge(String, int, int) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.graph.Graph
Like Graph.addEdge(String, String, String) but the nodes are identified by their indices.

addEdge(String, int, int, boolean) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.graph.Graph
Like Graph.addEdge(String, String, String, boolean) but the nodes are identified by their indices.
addEdge(String, int, int, boolean) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.GraphicGraph
 
addEdge(String, String, String) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.graph.Graph
Adds an undirected edge between nodes.
addEdge(String, String, String, boolean) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.graph.Graph
Like Graph.addEdge(String, String, String), but this edge can be directed between the two given nodes.
addEdge(String, String, String, boolean) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.GraphicGraph
 
addEdge(String, Node, Node) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.graph.Graph
Like Graph.addEdge(String, String, String) but the node references are given instead of node identifiers.

AdjacencyListGraph - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
A lightweight graph class intended to allow the construction of big graphs (millions of elements).
AdjacencyListGraph(String) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AdjacencyListGraph
Creates an empty graph with strict checking and without auto-creation.
AdjacencyListGraph(String, boolean, boolean) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AdjacencyListGraph
Creates an empty graph with default edge and node capacity.
AdjacencyListGraph(String, boolean, boolean, int, int) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.graph.implementations.AdjacencyListGraph
Creates an empty graph.
AdjacencyListNode - org.graphstream.graph.implementations中的类
Nodes used with AdjacencyListGraph
